LanguageData.StarStore_Gacha_Basic.label: Basic Supply Crate
LanguageData.StarStore_Gacha_Basic.description: Contains practical basic supplies, suitable for supplementing daily consumption during early development.
LanguageData.StarStore_Gacha_Advanced.label: Advanced Equipment Crate
LanguageData.StarStore_Gacha_Advanced.description: Contains weapons, armor, and combat bionics — the best choice for boosting your colonists' combat power.
LanguageData.StarStore_Gacha_Premium.label: Premium Secret Cache
LanguageData.StarStore_Gacha_Premium.description: The rarest items and most powerful equipment — the ultimate pursuit for your colony.
